name: Raisin Pear Streudel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, toss the pears, raisins, sugar, lemon juice, cinnamon, cloves, and salt.
2. On waxed paper, arrange a sheet of phyllo dough. Brush lightly with melted margarine and cut into 3 long strips.
3. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Place about 1 tablespoon of the pear mixture at the end of each strip. Begin to roll up the pastry in a jelly roll style, tucking in the sides as you go.
5. Place the roll, seam side down, on an ungreased cookie sheet. Brush the rolls with melted margarine.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve warm.
